zh.lifeSummary: 當Jullienne de Looz於大約1236年出生在比利時利包格波格洛時，她的父親Graaf Arnold IV van Loon35歲，母親Jeanne de Chiny32歲。她於1267年與Nicolas de Quievrain結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1301年享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jullienne de Looz于大约1236年出生在比利时利包格波格洛时，她的父亲Graaf Arnold IV van Loon35岁，母亲Jeanne de Chiny32岁。她于1267年与Nicolas de Quievrain结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1301年享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Looz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German and Swiss German: regional (Alemannic) nickname from Middle High German boese ‘ridiculous person, low-standing servant’ or from an ancient Germanic personal name Bozo (see Bosshart ).

variants.name: Bosshart
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Hans, Otto, Rudi.

Swiss German and South German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bōs ‘bad, evil, wild, angry’ and hard ‘hardy, strong, brave’, or a derivative of a short form of the personal name Burkhart (see Boss ). Compare Boshart 1 and Buzzard 2.

variants.name: Booze
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German   Booz  .

en.lifeSummary: When Jullienne de Looz was born about 1236, in Borgloon, Limburg, Belgium, her father, Graaf Arnold IV van Loon, was 35 and her mother, Jeanne de Chiny, was 32. She married Nicolas de Quievrain in 1267. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died about 1301, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jullienne de Looz est née environ 1236, à Borgloon, Limbourg, Belgique, son père, Graaf Arnold IV van Loon, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Chiny, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Nicolas de Quievrain en 1267. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1301, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jullienne de Looz um 1236 in Borgloon, Limburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graaf Arnold IV van Loon 35 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Chiny 32. Sie hat 1267 Nicolas de Quievrain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1301 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jullienne de Looz è nata il circa 1236 nel Borgloon, Limburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Graaf Arnold IV van Loon, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Chiny, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Nicolas de Quievrain nel 1267. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1301, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jullienne de Loozが約1236年にベルギーリンブルグボルグロオンで生まれた時，父Graaf Arnold IV van Loonは35歳，母Jeanne de Chinyは32歳であった。1267年にNicolas de Quievrainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1301年に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jullienne de Looz(이)가 대략 1236년 벨기에 림버그 볼그루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graaf Arnold IV van Loon(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Chiny(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1267년 Nicolas de Quievrain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1301년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1236–ca 1301: tany ho any amin'ny 1236–tany ho any amin'ny 1301

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jullienne de Looz nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Borgloon, Limburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Graaf Arnold IV van Loon, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Chiny, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicolas de Quievrain em 1267. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1301, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jullienne de Looz родилась около 1236 г. в местности борглун, лимбург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Graaf Arnold IV van Loon было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Chiny, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicolas de Quievrain в 1267 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1301 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

sm.Abt 1236–ca 1301: e tusa o le 1236–e tusa o le 1301

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jullienne de Looz nació aproximadamente 1236, en Borgloon, Limburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Graaf Arnold IV van Loon, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Chiny, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Nicolas de Quievrain en 1267. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1301, a la edad de 67 años.
